name: MoneyGram
description_short: MoneyGram at 158 Bleecker St in New York, NY offers money transfers and check cashing open daily 9AM–10:30PM.
description_long:
Located at 158 Bleecker St in New York's Greenwich Village neighborhood, this MoneyGram location sits in the heart of Manhattan's famous arts district. The standalone store operates with extended hours every day from 9AM to 10:30PM, making it convenient for residents, visitors, and workers in the area.

This New York MoneyGram location provides money transfer services, domestic and international wire transfers, and check cashing for customers. For questions about specific transfer fees, exchange rates, or account requirements, call +1 800-746-7287 directly from the location or from home.

As a New York, NY resident using this Bleecker St location, bring a valid government-issued ID and recipient information for wire transfers. Quick money transfers serve Manhattan's dense market, where many rely on such services for personal and business needs.
pros: Extensive network of physical locations across New York with hundreds of service points in both urban and rural areas
Online and in-person transaction options providing flexibility for different customer preferences
User-friendly location finder tool searchable by address, city, state, or ZIP code
Established global brand with long operational history in money transfer services
Accessible to underbanked populations who prefer in-person transactions
Coverage in small towns and rural areas where traditional banking options may be limited
cons: Website content does not disclose fee structures or pricing information, preventing cost comparison
No information provided about transfer speed, delivery timeframes, or service guarantees
Limited detail on exchange rates or currency conversion practices for international transfers
No mention of fraud protection, insurance, or liability coverage for transferred funds
Website excerpt does not address customer service channels, dispute resolution, or complaint handling
best_for: Customers in rural or underserved New York areas without nearby traditional bank branches
Individuals preferring face-to-face money transfer transactions over digital-only platforms
Users seeking domestic money transfers within the United States with convenient local pickup
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for New York residents who need accessible, in-person money transfer services and prefer physical locations over entirely digital platforms. The main caveat is that the company's website does not transparently disclose pricing, fees, transfer speeds, or service terms, making it difficult for consumers to conduct informed cost comparisons before using their service.
services: Domestic money transfers within the United States
In-person fund transfers at physical retail locations
meta_description: MoneyGram at 158 Bleecker St, New York, NY. Money transfers and check cashing open daily 9AM–10:30PM in Manhattan.
